# abacad

> A device interface for agents: connect a phone, laptop, or browser as a device and let a coding agent see the screen and act on it, one step at a time, with a human approving.

## Documentation Sets

- [Abridged documentation](https://abacad.ai/docs/llms-small.txt): a compact version of the documentation for abacad, with non-essential content removed
- [Complete documentation](https://abacad.ai/docs/llms-full.txt): the full documentation for abacad

## Notes

- The complete documentation includes all content from the official documentation
- The content is automatically generated from the same source as the official documentation
